id.description: ID of the database configuration to create or update.

master_timeout.description: Period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.

timeout.description: Period to wait for a response. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.

name.description: The provider-assigned name of the IP geolocation database to download.

maxmind.description: The configuration necessary to identify which IP geolocation provider to use to download the database, as well as any provider-specific configuration necessary for such downloading. At present, the only supported provider is maxmind, and the maxmind provider requires that an account_id (string) is configured.
